subject: refactor(style): move cell background to its own Background section
body:
Background color control was in Spacing section — doesn't belong there.
Now in its own collapsible "Background" section between Color Tint and
Spacing, with cell indicator and override checkbox + color picker.

Tags: style, background, ui, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cell-customization
Semver: patch

title: move cell background to its own Background section
